mapper.sql: select table_id, table_name, table_comment, class_name, package_name, module_name, business_name, function_name, gen_type, gen_path, pk_column, tree_code, tree_parent_code, tree_name, parent_menu_id, db_type, create_time, update_time from gen_table
mapper.select:
AND table_name like concat('%', #{tableName}, '%')
AND table_comment like concat('%', #{tableComment}, '%')
order by create_time desc

select table_name as "tableName", obj_description((table_schema || '.' || table_name)::regclass) as "tableComment" from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'public' and table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
and table_name like concat('%', #{tableName}, '%')
and table_name not in (select table_name from gen_table where del_flag = '0') order by table_name

select table_name as "tableName", obj_description((table_schema || '.' || table_name)::regclass) as "tableComment" from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'public' and table_name = #{tableName}

select column_name as "columnName", col_description((table_schema || '.' || table_name)::regclass, ordinal_position) as "columnComment", data_type as "columnType", case when column_key = 'PRI' then '1' else '0' end as "isPk", case when extra = 'auto_increment' then '1' else '0' end as "isIncrement", is_nullable as "isNullable" from ( select column_name, ordinal_position, table_name, table_schema, data_type, is_nullable, '' as column_key, '' as extra from information_schema.columns where table_schema = 'public' and table_name = #{tableName} ) t order by ordinal_position

select column_id, table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort from gen_table_column where table_id = #{tableId} order by sort
